DP.467.0000:
Oh, dear, are your Pokémon feeling
tired?\f
You should rest up.
Yes, good idea! Rest up here!
DP.467.0001:
Yes, yes, that’s right.
Get some well-earned rest.\f
DP.467.0002:
Oh, you’re still looking tired.
You’re still needing rest, are you?\f
You should rest up again.
Yes, good idea! Rest up here!
DP.467.0003:
Is that right?
You’re sure now?\f
I’m only concerned for your sake. No
need to worry about putting me out!
